sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11298" key="a)pallakth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαλλ-ακτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n11298.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">liberator from,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κακοῦ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> </cit> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:13:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
